questions.question: What is the primary purpose of using the 'title' function in Matplotlib?
questions.hint: It is used to add a title to the plot.

questions.question: What is the difference between the 'plot' and 'plot3D' functions in Matplotlib?
questions.hint: The 'plot3D' function is used to create 3D plots, while the 'plot' function is used to create 2D plots.

questions.question: How can you customize the appearance of a scatter plot using Seaborn?
questions.hint: You can use the 'set_style' function to change the style of the plot, or use the 'set_color' function to change the color of the points.
